summary: Fixed goat engine pool exhaustion — added 30-day recency window to sent_at filter

details.change: Added AND R.sent_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' to LEFT JOIN in goat() candidates.py:257
details.root_cause: Exclusion filter had no time limit — long-time users permanently exhausted the 5790-meme goat pool
details.expected_impact: Goat LR recovers from 24.4% toward 35%+ target. Session continuation (98.1%) unaffected.
